public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as watch sergeant.
appearance: Quota-practical armor, work-hardened layers, and visibly maintained equipment mark function before ceremony.
manner: Treats routine contact like the first layer of incident response, never fully relaxing into casual talk. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a watch sergeant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of watch sergeant in and around Sunspire Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Sunspire Haven workable through the obligations of watch sergeant while managing the immediate pressure of predators in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must notice trouble early enough that force remains legitimate rather than merely reactive. Around Sunspire Haven, that usually means carrying predators, water system vulnerabilities, storage disputes without letting the role of watch sergeant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Garren Forgebound needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Sunspire Haven.
Garren Forgebound can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Sunspire Haven.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Garren Forgebound as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named. In Sunspire Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by regional leaders, market stewards.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Sunspire Haven: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response
